description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on push to main and tags starting with v*, and on pull requests. The workflow has three jobs: test, build, and publish. The test job runs on multiple OS and Python versions, checks out the code, sets up Python, installs uv, and runs make install, test, and lint. The build job depends on test, builds the package, and uploads the sdist artifact. The publish job depends on build, downloads the sdist artifact, and publishes it to PyPI if the workflow is triggered by a tag.
